---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement"
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ["abhay557"]
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?
Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. Why is this needed?

## Proposed Solution
What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can.

## Example API / Usage
If you have an idea for how the feature would work, show it here:

```python
# Python example
import fakedata

# Your proposed usage
result = fakedata.data.users(100, { "your_new_option": True })
```

```javascript
// JavaScript example
const { data } = require('@abhay557/fakedata');

// Your proposed usage
const result = fakedata.data.users(100, { yourNewOption: true });
```

## Why Would This Be Useful?
Explain why this feature would benefit other users of the package. Who else would find it helpful?

## Alternatives You've Considered
Are there any workarounds or alternative solutions you've already tried?

## Additional Context
Any other details, references, or links that would be helpful.
